parameters.query:
INSERT INTO products (competitor_id, external_product_id, title, description, category, image_url, current_price, currency, updated_at)
SELECT c.id, $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW()
FROM competitors c
WHERE c.name = $8
ON CONFLICT (competitor_id, external_product_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  title = EXCLUDED.title,
  description = EXCLUDED.description,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  image_url = EXCLUDED.image_url,
  current_price = EXCLUDED.current_price,
  currency = EXCLUDED.currency,
  updated_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO price_history (product_id, observed_at, price, currency)
SELECT p.id, NOW(), p.current_price, p.currency
FROM products p
JOIN competitors c ON c.id = p.competitor_id
WHERE p.external_product_id = $1 AND c.name = $2;
